_schema: Salvage deals (Director ruling 2026-07-03): profit comes from judgment, time, parts control, reputation, and knowing when to walk away. condition_reads = what anyone sees (Director canon phrases). mechanic_read = what the wrench-eye reveals. true_parts/hidden_* stay invisible until the work starts. hold expires Friday after the offer.
